name: GamePlex
about: GamePlex is an indoor sports entertainment venue in Tracy, CA, offering a variety of sports simulators including golf, cricket, baseball, and softball. The facility provides a climate-controlled environment for year-round play and events. It caters to both individual practice and group activities, with a focus on advanced simulator technology and customizable party spaces. Their services include lane rentals, memberships, and event hosting for birthdays and corporate gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology with real-time gameplay and precision tracking
Indoor, all-weather venue for consistent playing conditions
Golf & Multi-Sport Simulator offering over 10+ sports for variety
Family-friendly atmosphere with stress-free environment for all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: No information about on-site food service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify whether equipment is provided, but it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the golf simulator experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No information about outside food or drinks policy is available on the website.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole golf experience take?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the duration for an 18-hole round, but it does mention they offer open lane rental and golf simulator sessions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GamePlex is designed with families in mind, offering age-appropriate games and a family-friendly atmosphere that welcomes kids of all ages.
